description_long: This object is a rugged, industrial-style shotgun with a distinctly mechanical and utilitarian design. The body is constructed from a weathered, metallic material with a brownish, camouflaged finish, accented by red highlights and black grip surfaces. The barrel is short and robust, featuring a serrated, saw-like edge along its length, suggesting a hybrid function or reinforced muzzle. The handle and grip areas are ergonomically shaped and covered in a textured, rubber-like material for secure handling. A prominent, angular guard surrounds the trigger area, and a digital or mechanical display panel is visible on the top of the receiver. The overall appearance is heavy-duty, with visible bolts, vents, and reinforced structural elements, indicating durability and functionality in harsh urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial shotgun with a weathered metal body, serrated barrel, and ergonomic black and red grips. Features include a prominent guard, digital display, and rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serrated barrel tip, prominent guard, and the symmetrical, reinforced structure of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the serrated barrel, the angular receiver, and the ergonomic black grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, the digital display panel, and the handle structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the serrated barrel, the handle, and the angular body contours.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with serrated, saw-like edge and reinforced muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Large, angular guard with squared edges and reinforced structure
